song.title: Oh, Happiness
song.presentation: C V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[C] Oh, happiness There's grace enough for us and the whole human race
[V1] From the full streams Of your care All who come Begin again Hard or friend Rich or poor All who need Need fear no more Such a thing to give away
[V2] All regrets, let go, forget There's something that mends all of it Such a thing to give away
[B] Sound the church bells Let 'em ring, let 'em ring For everything can be redeemed We can be redeemed, all of us
